/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/timer/population_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/timer/population_protocol_simtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/timer/population_protocol_simtime_otherwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/timer/population_protocol_simtime_ourwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/utils.cpp.o -o build/main
